violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-cooler was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor under chicken cooker needs cleaned of grease debris.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-coolers need cleaned of food debris was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required Reach-in-Freezers need cleaned of food debris. Handles on reach-in-freezers need cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor by cooking equipment needs cleaned of debris.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
